problemSet.question: If the drones detect an oil spill worth $500,000 in environmental damage, and the community has 1,000 people, what is the Social Dividend per person? (Impact Multiplier = 1.5)
If $2,000,000 in resources are saved, what are the Strategic Reserves (30% of resources)?
With a Social Dividend of $1,200 and Strategic Reserves of $800,000 for 1,000 people, what is the Communal Value Score per person?
If the traditional profit model yields $300 per person, and the Ubuntu model yields $750 per person, what is the percentage increase in community benefit?
If 10,000 liters are available for 100 people, what is each person's share?
If 1,000 riders save 30 minutes each across 50 routes, what is the efficiency score?
Venezuela has 161 metric tons of gold. Convert this to troy ounces. (1 metric ton = 32,150.75 troy oz)
If the spot price is $1,900/oz and Venezuela has 5,177,000 troy oz, what is the total value in billions? (Round to 1 decimal)
Using the 60/25/15 model, how much (in billions) goes to V_hold (60% strategic reserves)?
How many Trade School Modules can be funded? (Each module costs $1 billion)
How many Diplomatic Instruments can be established? (Each costs $2 billion)
A grid node serves a clinic (CDI=0.9), school (CDI=0.85), and shops (CDI=0.4). What is the average Community Dependency Index?
If an outage causes $50,000 direct loss and triggers $30,000 in secondary disruptions, what is the Cascading Risk Factor (CRF)?
Node A failure impacts 3 other nodes. Node B failure impacts 7 nodes. What is the Interdependence Sensitivity Score ratio (B/A)?
Calculate total Resilience Score: CDI=0.8, CRF=0.5, ISS=0.7 using R = (CDI×0.4) + (CRF×0.3) + (ISS×0.3)
Raw cocoa exports at $2/kg. After processing ($5), manufacturing ($12), and retail ($20), what is the Cake Chain Multiplier?
A nation exports $100M in raw minerals. With a Cake Chain Multiplier of 15x, what is the total potential value?
Coffee: Raw ($3) → Roasted ($8) → Packaged ($15) → Retail ($25). Calculate the value added from raw to retail.
If a trade corridor generates $500M annually with a 12x multiplier, what was the raw export value?

mathmodules.title: Cake Chain Mathematics: Value Multiplication
mathmodules.ubuntuFormula: C_m = V_total / P_raw | V_total = Σ(P_extraction + P_processing + P_manufacturing + P_distribution + P_retail)

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: A strategic guide to understanding and countering psychological warfare tactics used against African nations and communities. Covers cognitive sovereignty, narrative control, and mental decolonisation.
analyticsevents.title: African Psychological Warfare: The Capitan's Manual

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: A comprehensive framework for managing African wealth through the Ubuntu philosophy. Covers intergenerational wealth transfer, communal investment models, and sovereign financial instruments.
analyticsevents.title: African Wealth Management: The Ubuntu Inheritance

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: A visionary blueprint for rebuilding African civilisation over a century. Covers infrastructure, education, governance, technology, and cultural renaissance across the continent.
analyticsevents.title: Africa's 100-Year Plan: A Rebuilt Civilisation

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: An in-depth analysis of Africa's three primary sovereign economic engines. Covers resource extraction mathematics, agricultural sovereignty, and blue economy frameworks using Ubuntu value models.
analyticsevents.title: Africa's 3 Sovereign Engines: Mining, Farming & Fishing

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: A deep dive into Alkebulan — Africa's ancient name and identity — as the foundation for a 100-year continental renaissance plan. Covers cultural, economic, and political sovereignty.
analyticsevents.title: Africa's Alkebulan: The 100-Year Plan

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: A financial accounting of Africa's true wealth using Ubuntu mathematics. Maps trade corridors, resource flows, and value chains across the continent with sovereign balance sheet analysis.
analyticsevents.title: Africa's Balance Sheet: Ubuntu Corridors

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: Explores Africa's biological and ecological systems as models for industrial innovation. Covers bio-mimetic engineering, sustainable manufacturing, and nature-inspired technology development.
analyticsevents.title: Africa's Bio-Mimetics Arsenal

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: A practical roadmap for African nations to systematically decouple from colonial economic, political, and cultural systems. Covers monetary sovereignty, trade independence, and institutional rebuilding.
analyticsevents.title: Decoupling from Colonialism

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: A bold analysis of how Africa can reverse the flow of extracted wealth back to its source. Covers reparations mathematics, resource repatriation, and sovereign debt restructuring.

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: An unflinching examination of the political and economic deceptions that have shaped post-apartheid South Africa. Covers the ANC transition, mineral wealth capture, and the Ubuntu alternative.
analyticsevents.title: South Africa: The Great Deception

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: A vision for South Africa's economic and cultural renaissance through Ubuntu mathematics and sovereign resource management. Covers mineral wealth redistribution and community-led development.

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: A reinterpretation of South Africa's Great Trek through the lens of Ubuntu sovereignty. Explores land rights, migration patterns, and the mathematics of territorial sovereignty.
analyticsevents.title: South Africa: The Great Trek Reloaded

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: A technical architect's guide to building sovereign mineral wealth management systems. Covers ledger mathematics, resource accounting, and the Ubuntu value formula applied to mineral extraction.
analyticsevents.title: The Girth of the Ledger: An Architect's Guide to Reclaiming Sovereign Mineral Wealth

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: The definitive guide to Cake Chain Mapping — CAMS' proprietary framework for tracking value multiplication from raw resources to finished goods. Essential reading for African economic planners.
analyticsevents.title: The Sovereign Engine: Cake Chain Mapping for the African Renaissance

analyticsevents.author: CAMS Research Institute
analyticsevents.description: A revolutionary framework for managing Africa's ocean resources through Ubuntu mathematics. Covers blue economy sovereignty, maritime trade corridors, and sustainable fishing mathematics.
analyticsevents.title: The Ubuntu Oceans Policy: Blue Economy Reimagined

analyticsevents.description: The foundational textbook of Ubuntu Mathematics. Covers the complete sovereign calculus framework — from basic Ubuntu value formulas to advanced communal wealth distribution models.
analyticsevents.title: Ubuntu Maths: The Sovereign Calculus

innovations.name: Cake Chain Value Multiplication System

courses.title: Ubuntu Mathematics Foundations
courses.description: Master the core principles of Ubuntu Mathematics — the African philosophy of collective value applied to numbers, ratios, and real-world problem solving.

lessons.title: What is Ubuntu Mathematics?
lessons.description: Introduction to the Ubuntu philosophy and how it transforms the way we think about numbers and value.

lessons.title: The Ubuntu Value Formula
lessons.description: Learn the core Ubuntu Value Formula: UV = (C × I × S) / R and how to apply it.

lessons.title: Ratios and Proportional Thinking
lessons.description: Apply Ubuntu thinking to ratios — understanding how parts relate to the whole in community contexts.

lessons.title: Percentages in Real Life
lessons.description: Calculate percentages using African market and agricultural examples.

lessons.title: Assessment: Foundations
lessons.description: Final assessment covering all foundation concepts.

courses.title: Innovation Logic & Cake-Chain Modelling
courses.description: Deep dive into the Cake-Chain model for mapping innovation ecosystems. Learn to quantify impact, trace value flows, and build node-edge models of African innovations.

lessons.title: Introduction to Innovation Logic
lessons.description: What makes an innovation? How do we measure its value beyond profit?

lessons.title: The Cake-Chain Model Explained
lessons.description: Understand nodes, edges, and how value flows through an innovation ecosystem.

lessons.title: Mapping an African Innovation
lessons.description: Practical exercise: map a real African innovation using the Cake-Chain framework.

lessons.title: Quantifying Impact Metrics
lessons.description: Learn to assign numerical values to social, environmental, and economic impact.

courses.title: Agricultural Mathematics for African Farmers
courses.description: Practical mathematics for smallholder and commercial farmers — yield calculations, cost-benefit analysis, irrigation ratios, and market pricing using Ubuntu principles.

lessons.title: Yield Calculations
lessons.description: Calculate crop yields per hectare and compare across seasons.

lessons.title: Cost-Benefit Analysis
lessons.description: Determine profitability of farming activities using simple cost-benefit ratios.

lessons.title: Irrigation and Water Ratios
lessons.description: Calculate water requirements per crop type and optimise irrigation schedules.

lessons.title: Market Pricing Strategies
lessons.description: Use percentage markup and break-even analysis to price your produce correctly.
